title: Umlilo destroys Vuvuzela FC in super league
description: SOCCER NEWS - The Burning Fire FC’s...
bodyText:
SOCCER NEWS - The Burning Fire FC’s second team defeated Vuvuzela FC 1-0 in a Geolfa Super League game at the Lawaaikamp Stadium last weekend.


> Burning Fire dominated the game in the second half with great touches on the ball.


The only goal, Athenkosi Madubedube’s, was scored with a brilliant long-range shot in a set piece.

Both sides are currently logged at the bottom of the Super League log standings after 20 games played.

Super league weekend results

• Thembalethu Brothers 5-1 France United

• Southern Academy 4-1 Silver Stars

• Inkonjani FC 2-1 Rising Stars

• Burning Fire 1-0 Vuvuzela FC

• George Celtics 4-1 George United

• Spurs United 3-1 Future Stars

Promotional league

• Western Tigers 1-0 Burning Fire FC

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
